LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MILTON O'BRIEN (AMENDED) MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 24, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS OR COST BILL THAT IT SEEKS TO TAX NO LATER THAN JANUARY 18, 2013 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT MILTON O'BRIEN (AMENDED) MOTION TO TAX COSTS HEARING SET FOR JAN-24-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MILTON O'BRIAN'S (AMENDED) MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS GRANTED AS TO ITEMS G (ATTORNEY FEES OF $15,225) AND H (FEES UNDER CCP 685.070E FOR $100) IN THEIR ENTIRETY. THE MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS GRANTED AS TO ITEM E (LEVYING OFFICER'S FEES) IN THE AMOUNT OF $85. REGARDING ITEM G, PLAINTIFF SHOULD HAVE FILED A NOTICED MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AS REQUIRED BY CCP 685.080. IN ANY EVENT, THE MOTION AND OPPOSITION MAKE CLEAR THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO ATTORNEY'S FEES UNDER CCP 685.040. THE ORIGINAL JUDGMENT ENTERED PROVIDED FOR ATTORNEY FEES "INCURRED IN ENFORCING THE STIPULATED SETTLEMENT." (JUDGMENT DATED 10/2/97.) THE JUDGMENT DID NOT INCLUDE AN AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR PURSUANT TO CCP 1033.5(A)(10). NEITHER DID THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ATTACHED TO THE JUDGMENT. REGARDING ITEM H, PLAINTIFF DID NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION AS IT PERTAINED TO THIS ITEM AND DEFENDANT CORRECTLY ARGUES THAT THESE COSTS ARE ALREADY INCLUDED AT ITEM D. REGARDING ITEM E, PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO COSTS FOR ATTEMPTING TO EXECUTE AGAINST AN ENTITY WHICH IS NOT LISTED AS A JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Defendant Milton O'Brien (Amended) Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Thomas J. LoSavio, Esq. of Low Ball & Lynch, Tel. 415.981.6630, for defendant and moving party;
William e. King, Esq. of the Law Offices of William King, Tel. 925.284.7788, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MILTON O'BRIAN'S (AMENDED) MOTION TO TAX COSTS is granted as to Items g (attorney fees of $15,225) and h (fees under CCP 685.070e for $100) in their entirety. The motion to tax costs is granted as to Item e (levying officer's fees) in the amount of $85. Regarding Item g, Plaintiff should have filed a noticed motion for attorney fees as required by CCP 685.080. In any event, the motion and opposition make clear that Plaintiff is not entitled to attorney's fees under CCP 685.040. The original judgment entered provided for attorney fees "incurred in enforcing the stipulated settlement." (Judgment dated 10/2/97.) The Judgment did not include an award of attorney's fees to the judgment creditor pursuant to CCP 1033.5(a)(10). Neither did the Settlement Agreement attached to the Judgment. Regarding Item h, Plaintiff did not oppose the motion as it pertained to this item and Defendant correctly argues that these costs are already included at Item d. Regarding Item e, Plaintiff is not entitled to costs for attempting to execute against an entity which is not listed as a judgment debtor. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

(Amended) Notice Of Motion To Tax Costs

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MILTON O'BRIEN (Amended) Motion To Tax Costs is continued to January 24, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. The moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of the memorandum of costs or cost bill that it seeks to tax no later than January 18, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
